source: YouTube official channel (live) + BBW press releases (KABU)

kabu.title: KABU — original animated series
kabu.note: Build-A-Bear's first original animated YouTube series (Build-A-Bear Entertainment + Foundation Media + Laughing Dragon Studios), kawaii art style, with a tie-in plush line. It passed 500K views within ~7 weeks of its Dec-26-2025 debut — a real surge in owned-content engagement. (500K+ is the last company-disclosed figure; there is no public live per-series counter.)

creators_note: An active independent collector-creator scene posts hauls, unboxings and reviews (e.g. 70+ bear collection showcases) — adult-collector content, not kids' marketing.
